ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the test */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of test (e.g., phone number formatting, header inclusion) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the test (e.g., pending, in progress, completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the test was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the test */,
  "scheduled_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the test is scheduled to run */,
  "run_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the test was actually run */,
  "completed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the test was completed */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the test */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the test */,
  "test_group" TEXT /* Group or category of the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sms_messages" (
  "sms_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each SMS message */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test the message belongs to */,
  "sms_body" TEXT /* Body of the SMS message */,
  "sms_header" TEXT /* Header of the SMS message */,
  "sms_footer" TEXT /* Footer of the SMS message */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the SMS message (e.g., sent, delivered, failed) */,
  "sent_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the SMS message was sent */,
  "delivered_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the SMS message was delivered */,
  "failed_reason" TEXT /* Reason for failure if the message fails to send or deliver */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer to whom the SMS message is sent */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the SMS campaign */,
  "message_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the message in the SMS gateway */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sms_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sms_messages_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sms_messages_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "email_notifications" (
  "email_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each email notification */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test the email belongs to */,
  "email_body" TEXT /* Body of the email notification */,
  "email_subject" TEXT /* Subject of the email notification */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the email notification (e.g., sent, delivered, failed) */,
  "sent_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the email was sent */,
  "delivered_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the email was delivered */,
  "failed_reason" TEXT /* Reason for failure if the email fails to send or deliver */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer to whom the email is sent */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the email campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("email_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_email_notifications_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_email_notifications_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the customer record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the customer record */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the customer (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "registration_ip" TEXT /* IP address used for registration */,
  "subscription_plan" TEXT /* Subscription plan of the customer (e.g., free, premium) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test the result belongs to */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer the result belongs to */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the test (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the test result was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the test result */,
  "test_group" TEXT /* Group or category of the test */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign */,
  "result_details" TEXT /* Detailed results of the test (e.g., error messages, performance metrics) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id")
)
